finalized_plan.description: Use the inspect_file_as_text tool to read the contents of the attached PDB file "data/gaia/validation/7dd30055-0198-452e-8c25-f73dbe27dcb8.pdb"
Identify and extract the first two atom entries (lines starting with "ATOM" or "HETATM") from the file
Parse the x, y, and z coordinates for these two atoms according to the PDB file format
Compute the Euclidean distance between the two atoms using the formula √[(x₂ - x₁)² + (y₂ - y₁)² + (z₂ - z₁)²]
Convert the resulting distance (which is in Angstroms) to a value rounded to the nearest picometer (i.e., round to 2 decimal places, since 1 Å = 100 pm)
Use the final_answer tool to report the computed distance in Angstroms

notes: The agent ran successfully. The ground truth answer is incorrect. The answer should be 1.46 according to the instructions that state "Report the answer in Angstroms, rounded to the nearest picometer."
